# harvester_kubeovn_qos_policy (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_qos_policy" "example" {
  name         = "example-qos"
  shared       = true
  binding_type = "EIP"

  bandwidth_limit_rules {
    name      = "ingress-limit"
    rate_max  = "100M"
    burst_max = "200M"
    priority  = 1
    direction = "ingress"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `binding_type` (String)
- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `bandwidth_limit_rules` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--bandwidth_limit_rules))
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `shared` (Boolean)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_binding_type` (String)
- `status_shared` (Boolean)
